name: GOLFTEC Carmel
address: 9873 N Michigan Rd Suite 140B, Carmel, IN 46032
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training facility offering data-backed lessons, club fitting, and practice services. The company uses advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching. Services include private lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships, with a focus on measurable improvement and data-driven instruction. The company operates multiple locations globally and offers both indoor training and simulated golf experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides precise, data-driven feedback
PGA-certified coaches offer personalized instruction and improvement plans
Custom club fittings using advanced technology to optimize equipment
Indoor training bays with simulator technology for year-round practice
Structured lesson programs designed for measurable improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor mentioned for fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, but you can also bring your own equipment. They offer club rentals and fittings with top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned as being allowed. The focus is on golf instruction and practice services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator sessions vary, but typical 18-hole rounds take approximately 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and group size.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all ages and skill levels, including beginners and youth players.
